problem id: fc4a85ad
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  10101010 -> 01010101
  11001001 -> 11100100
  10011000 -> 01001100
  10000010 -> 01000001
  01110010 -> 00111001
  00010011 -> 10001001
  10100011 -> 11010001
  00100000 -> 00010000
  10101100 -> 01010110
  11001101 -> 11100110

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 10110111
